overrides.expect: \int_ {\gamma_ {k}} G _ {P _ {j}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 2 \pi & \text {if k = j}, \\ 0 & \text {if k\neq j}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: \int_ {\gamma_ {k}} G _ {P _ {j}} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 2 \pi & \text {if } k = j, \\ 0 & \text {if } k\neq j. \end{array} \right.
